summary: Completed comprehensive auth testing for CakeShop application. All authentication flows working perfectly - signup, login, admin access, JWT token storage, protected routes, logout, and security restrictions all functioning correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login returns JWT token in response body (admin@cakeshop.com / Admin@123)
Backend: User registration returns JWT token in response body
Backend: /auth/me protected route works with Authorization: Bearer header
Backend: Admin stats endpoint accessible with admin token
Backend: Public /cakes endpoint works without authentication
Backend: Unauthorized access properly blocked (401 response)
Frontend: Signup form stores JWT token in localStorage after registration
Frontend: Login form stores JWT token in localStorage after admin login
Frontend: Auth persistence - user stays logged in across page navigation
Frontend: Admin dashboard loads without 'Admin access required' error
Frontend: Admin cakes page loads with cake table (9 cakes displayed)
Frontend: Protected API calls use Authorization: Bearer header from localStorage
Frontend: Logout button clears localStorage and redirects to login
Frontend: Login after logout works correctly
Frontend: Regular users cannot access admin routes (properly redirected)
Frontend: No console errors on login, signup, admin, or home pages
